raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Affordable Rent Act aims to strengthen tenant protections statewide.",
    "The Tenant Protection Act of 2019 created rent gouging and eviction protections for tenants across California.",
    "Rent has increased nearly 40% in many California cities from 2020 to 2023.",
    "In Santa Maria, rent increased by 40.9% since the pandemic.",
    "In Bakersfield, rent increased by 39.4% since the pandemic.",
    "In Fresno, rent increased by 38% since the pandemic.",
    "In Riverside, rent increased by 37.5% since the pandemic."
  ]
}
```
